query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, startTimeEst, modelRunAt, awayModelSpread, modelTotal
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-15'
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, startTimeEst, modelRunAt, awayModelSpread, modelTotal
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-15'
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
